
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Goat|kanji=辛未|romaji=kanoto hitsuji|onyomi=shimmu|p=xīnwèi|w=hsin-wei|mi=ɕin⁵³ weɪ̯⁵³|y=san1 mei6|j=san1 mei6|ci=sɐn mei²|mc=sin mjɨjH|oc-bs=sin məɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Goat''', also known as {{ill|Xīnwèi|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīnwèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}（Kanoto-hitsuji, Shinkin-no-hitsuji, Shinbi）, is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 8th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following {{ill|Gēngwǔ|ja|庚午|1=Yang Metal Horse|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gēngwǔ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Horse|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Rénshēn|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rénshēn|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Xīn|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xīn|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} represents Yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Wèi|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wèi|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20128396}} represents Yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|qid=Q4697552|lt=Generating Cycle (Wuxing)|1=Aioi}} (Earth generating Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Goat (辛未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: shinbi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinmi (신미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Mùi

==Years of Yin Metal Goat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} where the remainder when divided by 60 is 11 is a Xīnwèi year.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Xīnwèi Years'''
|-
![[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]]!![[2nd Millennium]]!![[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
*[[:en:Qq|Qq]]
*{{ill|71|en|71|qid=Q4643093|lt=71|1=71}}
*{{ill|131|en|131|qid=Q395788|lt=131|1=131}}
*{{ill|191|en|191|qid=Q31751|lt=191|1=191}}
*{{ill|251|en|251|qid=Q30304|lt=251|1=251}}
*{{ill|311|en|311|qid=Q564280|lt=311|1=311}}
*{{ill|371|en|371|qid=Q48018|lt=371|1=371}}
*{{ill|431|en|431|qid=Q32146|lt=431|1=431}}
*{{ill|491|en|491|qid=Q30315|lt=491|1=491}}
*{{ill|551|en|551|qid=Q30943|lt=551|1=551}}
*{{ill|611|en|611|qid=Q31790|lt=611|1=611}}
*{{ill|671|en|671|qid=Q30722|lt=671|1=671}}
*{{ill|731|en|731|qid=Q23566|lt=731|1=731}}
*{{ill|791|en|791|qid=Q31078|lt=791|1=791}}
*{{ill|851|en|851|qid=Q29966|lt=851|1=851}}
*{{ill|911|en|911|qid=Q83119|lt=911|1=911}}
*{{ill|971|en|971|qid=Q23717|lt=971|1=971}}
|
*{{ill|1031|en|1031|qid=Q19315|lt=1031|1=1031}}
*{{ill|1091|en|1091|qid=Q19468|lt=1091|1=1091}}
*{{ill|1151|en|1151|qid=Q19642|lt=1151|1=1151}}
*{{ill|1211|en|1211|qid=Q5251|lt=1211|1=1211}}
*{{ill|1271|en|1271|qid=Q5523|lt=1271|1=1271}}
*{{ill|1331|en|1331|qid=Q6000|lt=1331|1=1331}}
*{{ill|1391|en|1391|qid=Q6378|lt=1391|1=1391}}
*{{ill|1451|en|1451|qid=Q6455|lt=1451|1=1451}}
*{{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}}
*{{ill|1571|en|1571|qid=Q6666|lt=1571|1=1571}}
*{{ill|1631|en|1631|qid=Q6860|lt=1631|1=1631}}
*{{ill|1691|en|1691|qid=Q7682|lt=1691|1=1691}}
*{{ill|1751|en|1751|qid=Q7615|lt=1751|1=1751}}
*{{ill|1811|en|1811|qid=Q6928|lt=1811|1=1811}}
*{{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}}
*{{ill|1931|en|1931|qid=Q18782|lt=1931|1=1931}}
*{{ill|1991|en|1991|qid=Q2062|lt=1991|1=1991}}
|
*{{ill|2051|en|2051|qid=Q49926|lt=2051|1=2051}}
*{{ill|2111|en|2111|qid=Q19694703|lt=2111|1=2111}}
*[[:en:2171|2171]]
*[[:en:2231|2231]]
*[[:en:2291|2291]]
*[[:en:2351|2351]]
*[[:en:2411|2411]]
*[[:en:2471|2471]]
*[[2531]]
*[[2591]]
*[[2651]]
*[[2711]]
*[[2771]]
*[[2831]]
*[[:en:2891|2891]]
*[[:en:2951|2951]]
|}

==Months of Yin Metal Goat==
In a Gregorian year where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to {{ill|Jiǎ|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiǎ|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Jǐ|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jǐ|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} in the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}), the {{ill|June|en|June|qid=Q120|lt=6th Month|1=June}} is a Xīnwèi month. However, in certain cases, the calculation is based on the {{ill|Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|lt=Lesser Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} to the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}).

==Days of Yin Metal Goat==
Xīnwèi days have specific meanings in the {{ill|Selected Days|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Selected Days|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} system.

=== Selected Days ===
A Xīnwèi day is the second day of the {{ill|Great Earth Period|ja|犯土|lt=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Earth Period|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}}.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Goat|qq=ja|辛未|version=98658243|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062873|af|Metaalbok (astrologie)|cdo|Sĭng-ê|de|Metall-Schaf|fr|Chèvre de métal|hak|Sîn-vi|ja|辛未|ko|신미 (간지)|nds|Metall-Schaap|vi|Tân Mùi|za|Sinmeih|zh-min-nan|Sin-bī|zh-yue|辛未|zh|辛未|zh-min-nan|Sin-chá|cdo|Sin-cṳ̄de|nds|Metall-Bokenevi|de|Yin Metal Goat|de|Metall-Bokeen|en|Metal Goat|fr|Chèvre de métalboishak|it|Sin-chṳ́id|za|Sincceij|ar|Yin Metal Goat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
